drivers.notes: 10 × 55 mm planar ribbon — part of the EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter module
Part of the EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter module

drivers.material: Clarity Cone paper and wood-fibre, SMC Gen-2 motor
Clarity Cone paper and wood-fibre, SMC Gen-2 motor

description.en: A 4-way floorstander shrunk down from the Epikore 11, swapping the four-woofer array for a 2 × 8″ Clarity-Cone bass section while keeping the same 6½″ midrange and EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter module. Curved cabinet with rear continuous-flare port tuned to 27 Hz, 112 dB max SPL and a 40–500 W amp window for medium-to-large listening rooms.
description.es: Un floorstander de 4 vías derivado del Epikore 11, que reemplaza la sección de cuatro woofers por un par de 8″ Clarity Cone manteniendo el mismo midrange de 6½″ y el módulo EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter. Gabinete curvado con puerto continuous-flare trasero sintonizado a 27 Hz, 112 dB SPL máx. y un rango de amp de 40–500 W para salas medianas a grandes.
